def positive_click_typer_env_lookup_per_command():
    rule_id = "click_typer_env_lookup_per_command"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "click or typer commands scatter repeated environment lookups through the command body."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
